body:
I don't think it is used much or, at the moment, yields much better results.
In addition, I want to heavily rework the advection module by having the topological check _inside_ the reconstruction functions instead of _outside_ in order to significantly reduce the operations we are doing and having a simpler structure helps tremendously towards this goal (i.e. after removing the `coeff_*` from the advection types we will also be able to remove the `buffer_scheme` fields).

I envision around a factor 1.5 - 2 performance improvement by following this path as well as a tremendous code simplification.

We can add stretched advection later on, including also 2d coefficients for 2d grids like the orthogonal spherical shell grid (which was my plan), but a substantial rework anyway. So, in my opinion, it is probably better to excise everything and restart fresh once the advection is completely reworked.

If there are no objections, we can merge it. What do you think @glwagner, @navidcy, @tomchor, @ali-ramadhan?
title: Remove stretched advection
